scripts.build:chrome:dev: TARGET=chrome vite build --mode development && TARGET=chrome BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode development
scripts.build:firefox:dev: TARGET=firefox vite build --mode development && TARGET=firefox BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode development
scripts.build:safari:dev: TARGET=safari vite build --mode development && TARGET=safari BUILD_TARGET=content vite build --mode development
scripts.build:dev: tsc && pnpm run build:chrome:dev && pnpm run build:firefox:dev && pnpm run build:safari:dev
scripts.build:chrome: TARGET=chrome vite build && TARGET=chrome BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../dark-pwa-chrome-v1.0.0.zip .
scripts.build:firefox: TARGET=firefox vite build && TARGET=firefox BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../dark-pwa-firefox-v1.0.0.zip .
scripts.build:safari: TARGET=safari vite build && TARGET=safari BUILD_TARGET=content vite build && cd dist/safari && zip -r ../dark-pwa-safari-v1.0.0.zip .
scripts.build: tsc && pnpm run build:chrome && pnpm run build:firefox && pnpm run build:safari
